baseline.notes: Run 38b: F1 0.392, P 0.356, R 0.436. Run 41 regressed (broad changes), Run 42 partial recovery (F1 0.351) but free_kick_shot tightening was the only durable win (FP 30→11, -2 TPs). Run 43 keeps ONLY the free_kick_shot tightening and reverts shot_stop_diving to test whether a single strict clause causes less global caution bleed than two.

targets.notes: Expect free_kick_shot to hold its FP cut (30→~11-15 range). Non-targeted types should rebound closer to Run 38b recall levels since only one strict clause remains in the prompt. F1 0.41 = +0.018 over Run 38b — first real ceiling break if achieved.

notes: Run #43 — minimal VLM prompt tightening: ONLY free_kick_shot requires wall OR foul context. shot_stop_diving reverted to original single-line definition after Run 42 showed its tightening had tiny precision benefit with significant collateral recall damage. Hypothesis: fewer strict clauses = less global VLM caution = recall rebound. Same gate config as Run #38b.
